name: Shell Panel
description: Contextual slide-out panel (drawer) from left or right with header and content

usageGuidance.when: Contextual details, filters, or secondary content in a slide-out panel; control open state from parent
antiPatterns: Don't nest ShellPanel inside another ShellPanel
Don't use for primary navigation - use LeftSidebar or RightSidebar

notes.open: Controlled by parent; toggle via class or state for visibility
notes.slots: Default slot for body content; header slot for custom header
notes.width: narrow for form/details; full for wide content

examples.name: Right panel
examples.description: Panel sliding in from the right

examples.name: Left panel
examples.description: Panel sliding in from the left
